items.title: Security update available for Adobe Commerce
items.summary: This update resolves critical, important, and moderate vulnerabilities in Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source. Successful exploitation could lead to arbitrary code execution, security feature bypass, and privilege escalation.

items.title: File Upload Vulnerability in Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: A critical file upload vulnerability in Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source could lead to privilege escalation. This vulnerability has a CVSS score of 9.6.

items.title: Improper Encoding or Escaping of Output Vulnerability in Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: A critical improper encoding or escaping of output vulnerability in Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source could lead to arbitrary code execution. This vulnerability has a CVSS score of 9.1.

items.title: Unauthenticated arbitrary file upload in Amasty Order Attributes for Magento
items.summary: An unauthenticated arbitrary file upload flaw in Amasty Order Attributes allows attackers to write executable files to a Magento store without logging in, potentially leading to remote code execution.

items.title: Unauthenticated PHP object injection in Mirasvit Cache Warmer
items.summary: Sansec discovered a critical unauthenticated PHP object injection vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer, a Magento extension, which can lead to remote code execution via a crafted cookie. The flaw is rated 9.8 (critical) and affects all versions before 1.11.12.

items.title: Security update available for Adobe Commerce
items.summary: This Adobe security update resolves critical, important, and moderate vulnerabilities in Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source. Successful exploitation could lead to arbitrary code execution, arbitrary file system write, application denial-of-service, and security feature bypass.

items.title: Adobe Commerce DOS Vulnerability
items.summary: A denial-of-service vulnerability in Adobe Commerce, caused by a vulnerable third-party component, can be triggered remotely without authentication or user interaction. Successful exploitation crashes the application, disrupting storefront and administrative availability.

items.title: Adobe Commerce Auth Bypass Vulnerability
items.summary: This Incorrect Authorization vulnerability (CWE-863) in Adobe Commerce allows a remote, unauthenticated attacker to bypass security checks and gain unauthorized write access. It has a CVSS 3.1 base score of 7.5.

items.title: Unrestricted file upload in Magento and Adobe Commerce
items.summary: Sansec discovered PolyShell, a critical flaw in Magento's REST API that allows unauthenticated attackers to upload executable files to any store by disguising code as an image. Attacks have been observed on a significant percentage of stores.
